title: Garden Route Badgers for Southern Superstars
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Three representatives from the Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers based in Oudtshoorn, Wynand de Ridder (coach, left), Charl-Francois Marais (middle) and Enathi Kitshini represented the Southern Superstars at the Cricket South Africa National Cubs tournament that ended in Stellenbosch on Tuesday 9 January.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Three representatives from the Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers based in Oudtshoorn, Wynand de Ridder (coach, left), Charl-Francois Marais (middle) and Enathi Kitshini represented the Southern Superstars at the Cricket South Africa National Cubs tournament that ended in Stellenbosch on Tuesday 9 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Superstars lost in the final against the Northern Champions.","html":"The Superstars lost in the final against the Northern Champions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Garden Route Badgers for Southern Superstars
